intro: Coriflora fremontii, also known as Fremont's corisca, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Coriflora fremontii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Coriflora fremontii is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally employed to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
